title: microsorum vieillardii
intro: Microsorum vieillardii, also known as the Austral fern or the Water Clover Fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Microsorum vieillardii include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. Microsorum vieillardii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications and potential health benefits.
